problems.title: Hiring tech talent shouldn't cost a fortune.
problems.desc: Whether you're a startup, an SME or an enterprise — you deserve a quality tech team at a fair price, with no hidden fees.

approach.title: Low margins. Invested talent.
approach.desc: Our model is designed so that the majority of your budget goes directly to the experts building your project — not into overhead.
approach.bar_bottom: Fee comparison: Wikolabs vs traditional agencies
approach.item1_text: Our management fees are among the lowest in the industry. Your budget funds real work, not a bloated structure.
approach.item2_text: Our experts are compensated in proportion to their contribution. Result: they are directly invested in YOUR project's success.
approach.item3_text: A portion of our fees funds the ongoing upskilling of our members. Your developers stay at the cutting edge.

why_clients.title: Why our clients choose us.
why_clients.desc: A model designed to align everyone's interests: you pay less, our talent earns more. Everyone wins.

expertise.title: {count} specializations at your service.
expertise.desc: Profiles selected on real projects, continuously trained, positioned 25% below the international market. From AI to design, backend to DevOps.

pricing.title: Clear daily rates, by profile and level.
pricing.desc: Junior (0-2 yrs), Mid-level (2-5 yrs), Senior (5+ yrs). Rates adapted per market: France, BE/LU, Canada, UK, Africa.

process.title: From brief to delivery: {count} steps.
process.desc: A clear, agile process with validation at every stage. You stay in control from start to finish.

cta.title: Ready to launch your next project?
cta.desc: Tell us about your needs. We'll get back to you within 24h with a team proposal and a transparent quote.

footer.brand_text: Initiative of Independent Young Digital Talents founded in Madagascar. Registered SARLU.
